_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_33_note: Session 33 (2026-05-29): ALAB deep session (event_queue; NVDA/MRVL Computex keynotes June 1/2 still pending — processed ALAB as first actionable queue item). Key findings: (1) ALAB NVLink Fusion ecosystem partner confirmed — custom connectivity for hybrid racks (non-NVIDIA XPUs via NVLink Fusion); first company in portfolio to be named NVIDIA NVLink Fusion connectivity partner; (2) ALAB +8.8% to $353.86 (52-wk high $354.53), 51% 6-day rally, $56B market cap; MoS deepens to -68.4%; (3) 10 hyperscaler engagements confirmed, targeting 'a couple' design wins by year-end; (4) TSM price updated $412→$424.34 (2-day drift from session 32 stale carry; no single-day >3%); (5) MRVL recovered to $206.04 from -9% low. next_deep_session = NVDA (absolute priority once June 1 keynote occurs).

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei. Session 33: keynote still pending (today is May 28-29). Session 34 absolute priority: capture actual keynote — Vera Rubin NVL72 official production volume guidance; N1X official specs; Dynamo 1.0 GA; Jensen 'surprise product' tease; Vera CPU availability/pricing. Six Rubin platform chips confirmed from CES: Vera CPU + Rubin GPU + NVLink 6 Switch + ConnectX-9 SuperNIC + BlueField-4 DPU + Spectrum-6 Ethernet Switch.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). NVLink Fusion showcase. Session 34/35: update MRVL entity after keynote. MRVL recovered to $206.04 from -9% post-earnings low ($191.84 intraday May 28).

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo. Price +8.8% to $353.86 on May 28 (52-wk high $354.53; 51% 6-day rally). NVLink Fusion ecosystem partner confirmed — hybrid rack connectivity for non-NVIDIA XPUs. 10 hyperscaler engagements; 'couple' design wins expected by year-end. Session 34/35: capture Computex demo outcome and any new hyperscaler design win announcements.

Price +3.6% on May 28 to $928.41 (new ATH close); $985 intraday ATH; $1T market cap crossed May 26. DCF last run May 26 (IV $442.63, MoS -52.3%). Q3 FY2026 earnings ~June 25 is the next major catalyst. No deep session needed before earnings; process after Computex cycle clears.

_event_queue_note: Session 33: ALAB processed (NVLink Fusion + price move). NVDA and MRVL remain pending their June 1/2 keynotes. ALAB Computex June 3 demo still upcoming. Queue order after Computex cycle: NVDA (June 1 keynote) → MRVL (June 2 keynote) → ALAB (June 3 demo outcome) → MU (earnings ~June 25).
